data.has_apikey: I already have an API key

user.description: API key authentication is the recommended way to use this integration.

apikey.description: Using an API key is the recommended authentication method.

data.generate_apikey: Use my credentials to obtain an API key

credentials.description: Octopus Energy Spain does not directly provide a way for users to generate or manage API keys, but this integration can generate one for you. Generating a new API key will invalidate any previous API keys for this user.

generated_apikey.description: Your new API key is shown below and pre-filled so you can copy it. This is the only time it can be viewed.

error.cannot_generate_apikey: Unable to generate an API key
